name: GPAO Runtime (BEAI Runtime Component)
description: BEAI Runtime component of GPAO for OpenClaw, where GPAO means Growth Personal AI Operating System. Provides current-turn judgment, Context Mesh continuity, evidence-aware replies, memory candidates, session continuity, and workflow state ledgers.

progressAckHook.description: Optional native OpenClaw progress-ack hook. Disabled by default so a native hook relay outage cannot block core Gateway, tool, session, or Telegram flows.

contextMeshTurnStart.description: Controls GPAO Context Mesh turn-start retrieval. 'always' matches GPAO for Codex behavior by resolving local Context Mesh evidence before every prompt build; admission gates still decide what is injected.
